metadata_notes: This version adds raw-source provenance from each normalized CSV row source_file column.
Course metadata fields are kept in a stable schema: place/map_name/distance_km/elevation_m/control_points.
Null means not extracted, not zero. For XML raw files, run scripts/update_metadata_from_raw.py from a clone of the repository to fill course details when they exist in the XML.
Relay field_size is team count, not runner count.
